alternatives.name: Containerized Li-ion BESS
alternatives.tradeoffs: Fire hazard, thermal-runaway, footprint 40-80 m2/MWh, 10-15% roundtrip loss

alternatives.name: Diesel / Gas Standby Generator
alternatives.tradeoffs: Fuel logistics, emissions permit, no peak shave / no revenue stack, noise

alternatives.name: Utility Tariff Renegotiation + Load Shifting Contracts
alternatives.tradeoffs: No capex; savings capped ~15%, no resilience, no revenue stack

alternatives.name: Do Nothing / Accept Peak Charges / Grid Upgrade
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero P1 burden; NOI erosion, grid-upgrade exposure >EUR 200k, 2 yr lead
